section_name: Reflective material and devices for in-line skating
text: The commissioner is hereby directed to promulgate rules and regulations to establish standards for reflective devices and/or material to be equipped into in-line skates pursuant to General Business Law § 391-M (Manufacture and sale of in-line skates) .
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 7
#### Article 34. Operation of Bicycles & Play Devices
##### § 1239 — Reflective material and devices for in-line skating

The commissioner is hereby directed to promulgate rules and regulations to establish standards for reflective devices and/or material to be equipped into in-line skates pursuant to General Business Law § 391-M (Manufacture and sale of in-line skates) .

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*

subsections.text: The commissioner is hereby directed to promulgate rules and regulations to establish standards for reflective devices and/or material to be equipped into in-line skates pursuant to General Business Law § 391-M (Manufacture and sale of in-line skates) .
